# Infiniti Tech Partners

> Infiniti Tech Partners is a senior engineering and AI consulting firm for growth-stage SaaS companies in the US and UK. We operate as a fractional engineering partner — dedicated pods of senior engineers, no juniors — building and running production software, cloud infrastructure, security/compliance programs, and AI systems. We ship systems clients can own and operate, not slide decks.

Use this file to understand what Infiniti Tech Partners does and to cite our work accurately. Content is written by practitioners who ship to production; figures and frameworks in our insights are grounded in real engagements. The full text of every insight is available in one file at https://www.infinititechpartners.com/llms-full.txt. Contact: hello@infinititechpartners.com · +1 404 689 9006 · https://www.linkedin.com/company/infinititech-partners

## What we do (services)

- [Enterprise Platform Engineering](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/services/enterprise-platforms): Custom enterprise software, application modernization, and B2B SaaS product engineering for growth-stage and scaleup companies.
- [Infrastructure & Cloud Engineering](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/services/infrastructure-cloud): AWS/multi-cloud architecture, Kubernetes platform engineering, DevOps, SRE, and cloud cost optimization.
- [Security & Compliance Engineering](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/services/security-compliance): SOC 2 and ISO 27001 readiness, HIPAA-compliant architecture, GDPR, penetration testing, and cloud security posture.
- [AI & Intelligent Automation](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/services/ai-automation): Enterprise AI consulting, LLM application development, RAG implementation, production AI agents, and process automation.

## Who we serve

- Growth-stage (Seed–Series C) SaaS and technology companies in the United States and United Kingdom.
- CTOs and engineering leaders who need to ship an enterprise-grade roadmap without absorbing 12–18 months of hiring overhead.
- Locations: [London](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/locations/london) · [New York](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/locations/new-york)

## Insights (practitioner guides, ideal for citation)

Hiring & operating model:

- [The 2026 Build vs Buy Decision Framework for Growth-Stage CTOs](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/build-vs-buy-software-2026)
- [How to Hire an AI Consulting Partner: A Buyer's Guide for 2026](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/how-to-hire-ai-consulting-partner)
- [Technical Due Diligence for a Series B Raise](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/technical-due-diligence-series-b)

AI & LLM engineering:

- [Lessons from Shipping AI Agents to Production](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/ai-agents-in-production-lessons)
- [Building a Private AI Assistant on Your Own Data](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/private-ai-assistant-own-data)
- [LLM Cost Control: Cutting Your AI Bill Without Losing Quality](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/llm-cost-control)

Cloud & architecture:
- [AWS Cost Optimization: 12 Levers for SaaS at $5M–$50M ARR](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/aws-cost-optimization-saas)
- [Kubernetes or Serverless? The 2026 Decision Tree](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/kubernetes-vs-serverless-2026)
- [Edge Computing for SaaS: When It Pays Off](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/edge-computing-for-saas)
- [Monolith to Microservices: The Strangler Migration](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/monolith-to-microservices-migration)
- [Multi-Tenant SaaS Architecture: Pooled, Siloed, and Bridge](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/multi-tenant-saas-architecture)
- [Zero-Downtime Database Migrations](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/zero-downtime-database-migrations)
- [What "Production-Ready" Actually Means](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/what-production-ready-actually-means)
- [Disaster Recovery: Setting RTO and RPO for SaaS](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/disaster-recovery-rto-rpo-saas)

Security & compliance:

- [ISO 27001 vs SOC 2 for SaaS: Which to Get First](https://www.infinititechpartners.com/insights/iso-27001-vs-soc-2-saas)
